title: CommunityResource
description: A resource the Queens DA points the public to — the items on the Resources page (Conviction Integrity Unit, Property Release information, Freedom of Information Law / FOIL requests, helpline lists) plus victim/witness and language/disability access resources. Today these are prose links on hand-built pages; this schema is the structured, agent-answerable resource directory.

name.description: Resource name (e.g. 'Freedom of Information Law Requests (FOIL)').
